title: Add mock concept linking (Golden Test 5)
problem: Accepted claims exist but are not linked to domain concepts. Golden Test 5 requires linking claims to creativity ontology concepts via deterministic mock output and validated claim_concepts rows.
evidence: docs/agents/00_GOLDEN_TESTS.md Test 5: concept linking maps claims to domain concepts.
acceptance_criteria: research link-concepts --source <source_id> links accepted claims to at least one creativity domain concept.
claim_concepts rows include claim_id, concept_id, role, and confidence.
Links are persisted and re-readable after process restart.
non_goals: Do not implement relationships, scoring, or public export.
Do not promote concepts to active status automatically.
rollback_plan: Revert the ticket branch; delete claim_concepts rows created during manual testing from the local SQLite file.
